_note:
Parent declares `refs.child: Component>` — Svelte 5's `Component

` is a callable-constructor signature, NOT an instance shape. `bind:this={refs.child}` assigns the component INSTANCE; neither our `__SvnInstance

` nor upstream's `SvelteComponent & Exports & { $$bindings: B }` satisfies `Component

` (missing call signature). Upstream svelte-check --tsgo verified to fire the same TS2322 at `Parent.svelte 12:30` (1-based). We report at line 11, column 29 (0-based machine-verbose format = 12:30 human-readable). TokenMapEntry on the `bind:this` LHS in `emit_bind_this_assignment` pins the diagnostic to the user's source position via `append_with_source`.
